titleStmt.title: SII 25.271: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 271. (A.R. No. 271 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.

p.hi: Tribhº Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ Iṟandakālameḍutta Perumāḷ Śrīvallabha Śaka 1466, year 10:

summary.p: This incomplete inscription furnishes the details of date viz., Śaka 1466, Regnal year 10, Krōdhi, Ṟishabha 2, ba 3. In the absence of the weekday and nakshatra, the christian equivalent cannot be worked out.

The king is stated to be the son of Abhirāma Parākramapāṇḍyadēva. He is credited with the title Tirunelvēlip-perumāḷ. It records the gift to the deity Tirukkiḷāvu[ḍaiya*]-nayiṉār for hōma and abhishēka by the king. Other details are not known as the record stops abruptly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakāptam 1000 4 100 6 10 6ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa svastiśrī kojaṭila varmmarāna tribhuvaṉaccakravatti konerimai koṇṭāṉ Iṟantakālam Eṭutta perumāḷ śrī vallabhadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu
krothi samvatssarattu ṛṣabha ñāyaṟṟu Iraṇṭāṉ tetiyum Apara pakṣattu tritikaiyum U ḷ Abhirāmaparākrama pāṇṭiya devanan=tanarāna tirunelvelip perumāḷāya nām Uṭaiyār tirukkiḷāvuṭaiya
nayiṉāṟku nityahomattukku kalacamāṭṭu Abhiṣekattukkum Ākak koṇṭut teṉ
vaṭalikoppaṇaṉḷuḷRead as ‘perumāḷ’pacumukkāl meṟpaṭi poṉṉaṉ vikiramapāṇṭiya koṉ
pacumukkālu vikiṟama pāṇṭiyakkoṉu caṭaiyakkoṉ pacu Oṉṟu Aḻakaṉ periyāṉ nallāḷ koṉ Incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.271 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
